hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"git 操作已完成。你必須立即向使用者回報：(1) 這次完成了什麼功能或修正；(2) 修改了哪些檔案；(3) 下一步計畫是什麼。不得略過此回報直接繼續下一個動作。"}}'; else echo '{}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo '🔍 Running pre-commit checks...' >&2; cd /home/user/LUMI && flutter analyze && flutter test && echo '{"continue": true}' || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Pre-commit checks failed: flutter analyze or flutter test did not pass. Fix the errors above before committing."}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi
